headline: Walt Disney in 5 Years: Boom, Bust, or Quietly Crushing It?
summary: After a trailing five-year price drop of 44%, investors are patiently waiting for the House of Mouse's shares to start climbing.

raw.headline: Walt Disney in 5 Years: Boom, Bust, or Quietly Crushing It?
raw.summary: After a trailing five-year price drop of 44%, investors are patiently waiting for the House of Mouse's shares to start climbing.

headline: How ‘Backrooms’ producer Peter Chernin thinks Hollywood needs to change
summary: Franchise fatigue could drive an entertainment industry sea change as the appetite for fresh ideas grows and younger audiences make up more box office sales.

raw.headline: How ‘Backrooms’ producer Peter Chernin thinks Hollywood needs to change
raw.summary: Franchise fatigue could drive an entertainment industry sea change as the appetite for fresh ideas grows and younger audiences make up more box office sales.
